Title: Wackenroder, Wilhelm Heinrich
Overview: Significant influence on the development of German romantic feeling for gothic style; work on Nürnberg instituted the cult of Albrecht Dürer; ideas about the divine source or art influenced Schlegel and others,
Sources: KGK 145; SGE, xxiii-xiv, 281, Bazin 131; Metzler Kunsthistoriker Lexikon: zweihundert Porträts deutschsprachiger Autoren aus vier Jahrhunderten. Stuttgart: Metzler, 1999, pp. 439-41.
